---
name: frontend-slides
description: Create animation-rich HTML presentations from scratch or by converting PowerPoint files. Reveal.js, slide transitions, and on-canvas animations.
---

# Frontend Slides

Create stunning, animation-rich HTML presentations using Reveal.js, custom CSS animations, and SVG morphing. Convert PowerPoint files to web-native slide decks.

## When to use

- Building an HTML presentation from a topic outline
- Converting a `.pptx` to web-native slides
- Adding on-slide animations and transitions

## Examples

- "Make me a 10-slide deck about X"
- "Convert deck.pptx to a Reveal.js presentation"
- "Add a fade-then-slide transition between slides"
